task_completion.description: Verifies that Linear Regression is configured correctly in Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi interface showing 'Linear Regression' in the analysis panel, with 'Exam' placed in the Dependent Variable box, and 'Anxiety' and 'Revise' placed in the Covariates box.

task_completion.description: Verifies that Cook's Distance is selected to be saved to the dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Linear Regression options, the 'Save' section is expanded and 'Cook's Distance' is checked, OR the Jamovi Data spreadsheet view shows a newly generated column containing Cook's distance values.

task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the influential_student_report.txt file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal window showing the file 'influential_student_report.txt' open for editing in the ~/Documents/Jamovi/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verifies the report contains the model R-squared value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the exact line format 'model_r_squared: <value>' with a numerical value filled in.

task_completion.description: Verifies the report contains the maximum Cook's distance and the corresponding student code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the lines 'max_cooks_distance: <value>' and 'student_code: <value>' with the identified values filled in.

task_completion.description: Verifies the Jamovi project is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application window title bar displays 'Influential_Analysis.omv' OR a file manager/terminal shows the file 'Influential_Analysis.omv' successfully created in the ~/Documents/Jamovi/ directory.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis rather than bypassing it.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Jamovi application open, with the dataset loaded and the regression analysis actively configured in the UI, not solved via external Python/R scripts in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually inspected the Jamovi data to find the highest Cook's distance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen viewing the Jamovi data spreadsheet tab, potentially sorting the Cook's distance column or scrolling to identify the maximum value and the corresponding student row.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent didn't instantly generate the report with pre-computed values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report creation and population steps must occur chronologically after the Jamovi analysis and data inspection steps are visible in the trajectory.
